searchWindow: Fall 2026 (Scenario A: Sept-Dec 2026 4-month; Scenario B: Sept 2026-Aug 2027 12-month)

listings.utilities: Tenant pays; lawn and snow care not stated
listings.pros: Walking distance to both universities, full bath on each level, finished basement

listings.cons: Transit commute runs over 20 minutes, strict application package required

listings.pros: Fully furnished, in-unit laundry, central air

actFast: 457 Dansbury Dr was listed only 9 days ago and is priced under market for 5 bedrooms. MLS rentals like this typically lease within 2 to 4 weeks.
110 Peppler St (18 days) and 134 Bridgeport Rd E (15 days) are mid-cycle. Walk-to-campus 5-bedroom houses rarely last past a month.
105 Marshall St is available immediately with a first-month promo, which means the landlord wants it filled now. If the group wants it for September, call soon and negotiate the start date.
scenarioANote: No whole-house 4-month (September to December 2026) leases were found in this pass. Four-month terms in Waterloo are almost always sublets or per-room student buildings, and most surface on Facebook groups and r/uwaterloo from late July onward. The daily refresh watches for them; 20 Cardill Cres is the closest current option if the landlord will do a 4-month room block.
